metadata.description: JoeFastTubeAI — give Claude a video input with caching and saved results. Downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, answers, and persists every run to disk.

plugins.name: JoeFastTubeAI
plugins.description: Watch a video (URL or local path) with per-video caching and persistent output. Downloads with yt-dlp, extracts frames with ffmpeg, transcribes via captions or Whisper, and saves prompt.md + result.md + frames per request.
